markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the new content calendar and align on the "agentic commerce" strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The new content calendar is live, organized by cluster and vertical. The team will prioritize topics by next week to guide production.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [A new "agentic commerce" strategy was defined: target the niche of "agentic commerce for loyalty/promotions" instead of the broad, highly competitive "agentic commerce" space.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [GrowthX will research search intent for this niche. The internal team will continue creating deep-expertise content (e.g., reports), which GrowthX will support with ancillary articles.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [GrowthX will provide the GEO data benchmark report and the first calibration article (an optimization piece) by the end of the week.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

## Topics

### Content Calendar & Production Process

  - [The new content calendar is live, organized by cluster and industry vertical.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**Action:** The team will use the calendar's priority tab to mark topics as "high" or "low" priority within the next week.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [**Production Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [GrowthX uses custom "agentic workflows" that dynamically pull from client artifacts (writing guidelines, case studies) to generate content.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [Agents self-evaluate and iterate to ensure quality before a human editor performs a final editorial pass.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Feedback updates the artifacts, improving future content.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [**Interlinking Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
      - [New articles are automatically interlinked by an agent that scans the sitemap.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
      - [GrowthX's managing editor will manually interlink older articles to new, relevant content.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [**Content Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [The default is to optimize existing articles, as this typically yields faster results.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [New articles are created only if an old article's URL slug is unoptimized, requiring a redirect.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

### "Agentic Commerce" Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The team questioned whether to continue producing content on "agentic commerce," given its newness and low search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
  - [**Initial Analysis:** The broad "agentic commerce" topic is highly competitive (SEMrush KD 70), dominated by major players like OpenAI and Salesforce.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** The goal is not to compete with these giants but to own a specific niche.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
      - [**Target Niche:** "Agentic commerce for loyalty and promotions."](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This positions the company as a key solution for businesses already exploring agentic commerce and looking to optimize their loyalty programs.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Execution Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
      - [**Internal Team:** Continue creating deep-expertise content (e.g., the upcoming report) that GrowthX cannot easily replicate.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Create ancillary articles that support the internal team's content, forming a powerful, interlinked cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Research:** GrowthX and Reza will investigate search intent for this niche to validate the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
      - [Provide the GEO data benchmark report.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
      - [Deliver the first calibration article (an optimization piece).](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [**Reza:**](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [Share topics and details for the "agentic commerce for loyalty/promotions" niche.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [Research search intent for the new niche.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
  - [**Isabelle & Reza:**](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
      - [Prioritize topics in the content calendar by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/KtgCLyFyGKEVhRK_SQ8HhEXb9EFeYjsy?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
